name: claude-limit-handoff
description: Create handoff files between Codex and Claude Code near usage limits.

interface.shortDescription: Generate Claude and Codex handoffs near usage limits.
interface.longDescription: Create handoff files so Codex and Claude Code can continue each other's work when one assistant is near a usage limit. Includes commands for Codex-to-Claude handoffs, Claude-to-Codex handoffs, and Codex usage checks.
defaultPrompt: Create a Codex to Claude handoff.
Check Codex usage and hand off if near limit.
Create a Claude to Codex handoff.
